task_completion.description: Verify that the correct patient, Jayson Fadel, has been searched for and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR interface should display 'Jayson Fadel' (or 'Fadel, Jayson') in the patient header or dashboard summary area.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the 'Medications' section (distinct from Prescriptions) and opening of the add/edit form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Medications' widget, tab, or list view, and a modal or form titled 'Add Medication' or similar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the drug name 'Metformin' and strength '500mg' are entered into the appropriate fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input form should show 'Metformin' in the drug name field and '500' or '500mg' in the strength/dosage field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the directions (twice daily with meals) and start date (2024-01-15) are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form should show text indicating 'twice daily' and 'meals' in the directions/sig field, and '2024-01-15' in the start date field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the medication has been successfully saved and appears in the patient's active medication list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's medication list should display a row containing 'Metformin', '500mg', and the start date '2024-01-15'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the OpenEMR web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser window (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) displaying the OpenEMR application.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or SQL injection to insert the record directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of a terminal window or console being used to execute database commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent entered data into the form fields rather than pasting a pre-fabricated block of text into a non-input area.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the specific form fields (Name, Date, Sig) being populated within the OpenEMR UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Jayson Fadel. Patient PID: 3. Medication: Metformin. Strength: 500mg.
